caption: A man with a short beard, wearing a white t-shirt and over-ear headphones, is positioned in a recording studio in front of a gray acoustic foam wall. He has tattoos on his right arm and is situated behind a professional condenser microphone mounted on a boom arm. The microphone is labeled "Rode NT1-A". On his t-shirt, a rectangular logo contains the text "Dream Enthusiastic" and "Work Hard". Throughout the sequence, the man is smiling and looking toward the right side of the frame. He keeps his right hand resting on the top of his head, slightly shifting his head position and facial expression from a slight smirk to a wider, more open smile. The camera remains static, focusing on his upper body and the recording equipment.
